name: Turnip & Apple Whip
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith apples, peeled and cored
1 large onion, peeled and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Peel and quarter fresh turnips. Do not bother defrosting frozen ones.
3. Combine all ingredients in a baking dish with a cover.
4. Cover and place in the oven for 35 minutes.
5. Remove from oven, transfer contents of the baking dish to a food processor, and puree until smooth.
6. Spoon the puree into a serving dish and serve immediately.
